backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for PDF Vaulty that manages user profiles and file records with role-based access control, supporting CRUD operations for files and profiles stored per-principal.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the removal of the PowerPoint to PDF tool, listing the affected files and components with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each component's purpose, used as a build planning reference for the PDF Vaulty frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for PDF Vaulty that loads CDN scripts for pdf-lib, jsPDF, xlsx, and pdf.js, sets the page title/meta, and mounts the React app.
frontend/public/.ic-assets.json5: Internet Computer asset canister configuration that sets correct Content-Type headers for sitemap.xml and the Google Search Console verification file.
frontend/public/google61423bcf1843cd2d.h: Google Search Console HTML verification file for the PDF Vaulty domain.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing all public URLs for PDF Vaulty including tool pages, analytics, and my-files, with priorities and change frequencies.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages authentication state, view routing (dashboard, tool, analytics, myFiles), and renders Header, Footer, and the active page or tool.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: App footer displaying copyright, a caffeine.ai attribution link, and a purple gradient accent bar at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the sticky app header with logo, navigation links (Home, Analytics, My Files), theme toggle, and login/logout controls using Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and save their profile before proceeding.
frontend/src/components/shared/FileUploa: Reusable drag-and-drop file upload component that supports single/multiple files, file reordering, removal, and displays file size and type icons.
frontend/src/components/tools/CompressPD: PDF compression tool that renders each page to a canvas via pdf.js, re-encodes it as JPEG, and rebuilds a smaller PDF using pdf-lib, then offers the result as a download.
frontend/src/components/tools/ExcelToPDF: Converts uploaded Excel files to PDF by parsing sheets with SheetJS and rendering styled tables using jsPDF, then triggers a download.
frontend/src/components/tools/ImageToPDF: Converts one or more JPG/PNG images into a multi-page PDF using jsPDF, sizing each page to match the source image dimensions.
frontend/src/components/tools/MergePDFTo: React component that allows users to upload multiple PDF files and merge them into a single downloadable PDF using pdf-lib.
frontend/src/components/tools/PasswordPr: React component that accepts a PDF and a password, re-saves the PDF with updated metadata using pdf-lib, and downloads it with a disclaimer about limited browser-based encryption.
frontend/src/components/tools/PDFToWordT: React component that extracts text from a PDF via regex parsing and converts it to an RTF file downloadable as a Word-compatible document.
frontend/src/components/tools/PowerPoint: Empty file with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/tools/RotatePDFT: React component that loads a PDF, lets the user choose a rotation angle (90°, 180°, 270°), applies it to all pages using pdf-lib, and downloads the result.
frontend/src/components/tools/SplitPDFTo: React component that splits a PDF into separate files by multiple modes: every page, a page range, specific pages, or fixed-size chunks, using pdf-lib.
frontend/src/components/tools/WordToPDFT: React component that extracts text from a .docx file and generates a formatted PDF using jsPDF, then triggers a download.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend operations including fetching/saving user profiles and file CRUD (get, save, delete), all using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including color tokens for the vault UI.
frontend/src/lib/pdfUtils.ts: Utility helpers that expose CDN-loaded PDF libraries (pdf-lib, jsPDF, XLSX) via window globals with error guards, plus helper functions for downloading files and formatting byte sizes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsPage.tsx: Static analytics page displaying placeholder zero-value usage statistics and per-tool breakdowns for PDF operations with a hero section and grid layout.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard landing page that displays a hero section and a grid of six PDF tool cards (merge, split, compress, protect, rotate, convert), each navigating to the selected tool on click.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Landing/login page showcasing PDF tool features (merge, split, compress, etc.) with a hero section and tool grid; clicking any tool card triggers Internet Identity login.
frontend/src/pages/MyFilesPage.tsx: Page for managing the user's stored PDF files, supporting upload (with progress), deletion, and listing files with metadata fetched via React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/ToolPage.tsx: Wrapper page that renders the appropriate PDF tool component based on a `toolId` prop, with a back button and title header.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: TypeScript ambient declarations for the jsPDF library loaded as a CDN global, covering the `jsPDF` class and its core methods.
frontend/src/types/jszip.d.ts: Retained-for-reference TypeScript ambient declarations for JSZip (no longer actively used, replaced by a native browser ZIP parser for DOCX).
frontend/src/types/pdf-lib.d.ts: TypeScript ambient declarations for pdf-lib and pdf.js loaded as CDN globals, covering `PDFDocument`, `PDFPage`, `PDFImage`, and pdf.js rendering interfaces.
frontend/src/types/xlsx.d.ts: TypeScript ambient declarations for the SheetJS (xlsx) library loaded as a CDN global, covering workbook/worksheet types and utility functions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom design tokens (vault color scheme, shadows, fonts), CSS variable-based color palette, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Tracks project state and versioning for a task to remove the PowerPoint to PDF tool from the application, including feature metadata and configuration flags.
